title: What should chart similarity score algorithm consider?
author: Hot_Style5572
selftext:
Working on a research tool to essentially filter out chart fragments matching my "template" chart by calculating similarity scores and removing all sections with the score below a certain threshold.

First version included only close price of each candle for the algorithm.

Now we're adding other OHLC elements and trying to evaluate if all of them should be equally important (should the low wick be as important as the closing price? etc.).

We also know we want to include volume and perhaps volatility, but still trying to figure out how exactly. Just overall volume trend? Average volume? Volume per "matching" candle?

Hit me with your thoughts and ideas. Questions of course always welcome, happy to explain.
